testcase.name: test_upload_endpoint_accepts_user_context_form_field

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_add_document_modal.py:23: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
